prompt_seed: Over The Shoulder 3: Land the scene consequence or transition cleanly. over_the_shoulder. Shoulder-level conversational framing with visible foreground presence. Over-the-shoulder composition in Remote Arizona quartz vein/hills.
shot_notes: Establish the agreement: Powell leaves for machinery, Carter stays to guard.
evidence_summary: Establish the inciting incident and the stakes (the gold claim).
In 1865, Carter and Powell discover a massive gold-bearing quartz vein in the Arizona hills. They agree on a plan: Powell will head to civilization for machinery while Carter stays to guard the site.
